# Vela

> Vela is a workflow automation platform for modern teams — plan projects, automate routine work, and ship faster from one connected workspace.

Vela connects the tools a team already uses, automates the routine steps between
them, and keeps everyone working from the same source of truth. It is built for
product, engineering, marketing, and operations teams that want to cut manual
hand-offs. A free plan is available with no credit card required.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.vela.com/): Product overview, features, and FAQ.
- [About](https://www.vela.com/about): Team, mission, company facts, and contact.
- [Blog](https://www.vela.com/blog): Authored articles on workflow automation and team coordination.

## Features

- Automations: Trigger actions across your tools the moment a task changes status.
- One workspace: Projects, tasks, and docs in one place, always in sync.
- Integrations: Connect Slack, GitHub, and Google Workspace in a few clicks.
- Real-time updates: Everyone sees changes the instant a teammate makes them.
- Workflow templates: Start from proven workflows for sprints, launches, and reviews.
- Insights: Dashboards show where work stands and what needs attention next.

## FAQ

- What is Vela? A workflow automation platform that helps modern teams plan projects, automate routine steps, and ship work faster from one connected workspace.
- Who is Vela for? Product, engineering, marketing, and operations teams that want to reduce manual hand-offs.
- Is there a free plan? Yes — start for free with no credit card required, and upgrade as your team grows.

## Notes

- Pricing: Free plan available; paid plans scale with team size.
- The /scores route is an internal dashboard and is not part of the public product.
